GB/T 13786一2022
3.7
illumination
the Iluminous flux of visible light received per unit area
NOTE The unit is Ilux (lx).
3.8
average illuminance
the average iluminance of each illuminance on the specified surface
3.9
uniformity ratio of illuminance
the ratio of the minimum iluminance to the average iluminance on the specified surface
[source: GB/T 2900. 65一2004,， 845-09-58,， modified]
3.10
neutral color
an object”s surface color without selectivity absorption of light spectrum
[source: GB/T 5698一2001, 4.2]
3.11
Munsell neutral value scale
a series class of lights that covers from complete black (CN 0) to complete grey(CN 5) to complete
white CN 10).
NOTE ”For example: Munsell Neutral N7.0 is light grey, N 8.0 and N 8.5 are lighter greys,， while N 9.5 is a very good

white
4 IlIumination quality
4.1 Correlated color temperature
The correlated color temperature shall be (7 500土200)K. The spectral power distribution of artificial
daylight for the cotton classing rooms shall be as close as possible to the CIE D75 ilumination color
quality standard curve shown in Annex A.
3
